---
title: ""
toc: false
description: "PhD positions in AI for sustainability at IIT Gandhinagar. Research areas: environmental monitoring, health sensing, energy analytics, computer vision, LLMs. Advisor: Prof. Nipun Batra."
---

<script type="application/ld+json">
{
  "@context": "https://schema.org",
  "@type": "JobPosting",
  "title": "PhD Student - AI for Sustainability",
  "description": "PhD positions in Computer Science and Engineering at IIT Gandhinagar, working on AI for sustainability including environmental monitoring, health sensing, energy analytics, and machine learning for social good.",
  "datePosted": "2026-03-09",
  "employmentType": "FULL_TIME",
  "hiringOrganization": {
    "@type": "EducationalOrganization",
    "name": "Sustainability Lab, IIT Gandhinagar",
    "sameAs": "https://sustainability-lab.github.io"
  },
  "jobLocation": {
    "@type": "Place",
    "address": {
      "@type": "PostalAddress",
      "addressLocality": "Gandhinagar",
      "addressRegion": "Gujarat",
      "addressCountry": "IN"
    }
  },
  "qualifications": "BTech/BE/MSc/MTech in Computer Science, Electrical Engineering, or related fields. Strong programming skills and interest in machine learning research.",
  "educationRequirements": "Master's or Bachelor's degree in a relevant field"
}
</script>

<style>
.phd-hero {
    background: #fafafa;
    color: #1e293b;
    text-align: center;
    padding: 50px 20px;
    border-radius: 16px;
    margin-bottom: 40px;
    border: 1px solid #e2e8f0;
}

.phd-hero h1 {
    font-size: 2.8rem;
    font-weight: 700;
    margin-bottom: 16px;
}

.phd-hero .subtitle {
    font-size: 1.2rem;
    color: #475569;
    max-width: 650px;
    margin: 0 auto 24px auto;
}

.content-card {
    background: white;
    padding: 30px;
    border-radius: 12px;
    box-shadow: 0 2px 8px rgba(0, 0, 0, 0.06);
    margin-bottom: 30px;
    border: 1px solid #e2e8f0;
}

.content-card h2 {
    color: #334155;
    font-size: 1.8rem;
    margin-bottom: 20px;
    font-weight: 600;
}

.research-areas {
    display: grid;
    grid-template-columns: repeat(auto-fit, minmax(280px, 1fr));
    gap: 20px;
    margin: 25px 0;
}

.research-area {
    padding: 24px;
    border: 1px solid #e2e8f0;
    border-radius: 12px;
    transition: all 0.3s ease;
    background: white;
}

.research-area:hover {
    border-color: #334155;
    transform: translateY(-2px);
    box-shadow: 0 4px 15px rgba(0, 0, 0, 0.08);
}

.research-area h4 {
    font-size: 1.1rem;
    font-weight: 600;
    color: #2d3748;
    margin-bottom: 10px;
}

.research-area p {
    color: #4a5568;
    font-size: 0.95rem;
    line-height: 1.5;
    margin-bottom: 0;
}

.outcome-grid {
    display: grid;
    grid-template-columns: repeat(auto-fit, minmax(200px, 1fr));
    gap: 16px;
    margin: 20px 0;
}

.outcome-item {
    background: #f8fafc;
    padding: 16px;
    border-radius: 8px;
    border-left: 4px solid #334155;
}

.outcome-item strong {
    display: block;
    color: #2d3748;
    margin-bottom: 4px;
}

.outcome-item span {
    color: #4a5568;
    font-size: 0.9rem;
}

.highlight-box {
    background: #eff6ff;
    border: 1px solid #bfdbfe;
    border-radius: 8px;
    padding: 16px;
    margin: 16px 0;
}

.highlight-box strong {
    color: #334155;
}

.btn {
    display: inline-block;
    padding: 12px 24px;
    border-radius: 8px;
    text-decoration: none;
    font-weight: 600;
    transition: all 0.3s ease;
    margin-right: 10px;
    margin-bottom: 8px;
    font-size: 0.95rem;
}

.btn-primary {
    background-color: #334155;
    color: white;
}

.btn-primary:hover {
    background-color: #1e293b;
    transform: translateY(-1px);
    text-decoration: none;
    color: white;
}

.btn-secondary {
    background-color: transparent;
    color: #334155;
    border: 2px solid #334155;
}

.btn-secondary:hover {
    background-color: #334155;
    color: white;
    text-decoration: none;
}

.phd-alumni-card {
    display: flex;
    align-items: center;
    gap: 20px;
    background: #f8fafc;
    border: 1px solid #e2e8f0;
    border-radius: 12px;
    padding: 20px;
    margin-bottom: 16px;
}

.phd-alumni-card img {
    width: 80px;
    height: 80px;
    object-fit: cover;
    border-radius: 8px;
    flex-shrink: 0;
}

.phd-alumni-info .name {
    font-weight: 600;
    font-size: 1.1rem;
    color: #2d3748;
}

.phd-alumni-info .position {
    color: #334155;
    font-weight: 500;
    margin-top: 4px;
}

.phd-alumni-info .details {
    color: #4a5568;
    font-size: 0.9rem;
    margin-top: 6px;
}

.timeline-step {
    display: flex;
    gap: 16px;
    margin-bottom: 20px;
    align-items: flex-start;
}

.step-number {
    background: #334155;
    color: white;
    width: 32px;
    height: 32px;
    border-radius: 50%;
    display: flex;
    align-items: center;
    justify-content: center;
    font-weight: 700;
    flex-shrink: 0;
}

.step-content h4 {
    margin: 0 0 4px 0;
    color: #2d3748;
}

.step-content p {
    margin: 0;
    color: #4a5568;
    font-size: 0.95rem;
}

@media (max-width: 768px) {
    .phd-hero h1 {
        font-size: 2.2rem;
    }
    .research-areas {
        grid-template-columns: 1fr;
    }
    .phd-alumni-card {
        flex-direction: column;
        text-align: center;
    }
}
</style>

<div class="phd-hero">
<h1>PhD Positions</h1>
<p class="subtitle">We are always looking for strong PhD students to join us in building AI solutions for real-world sustainability challenges.</p>
<a href="mailto:nipun.batra@iitgn.ac.in" class="btn btn-primary">Write to Prof. Nipun Batra</a>
<a href="https://www.iitgn.ac.in/academics/phd" target="_blank" class="btn btn-secondary">IIT Gandhinagar PhD Portal</a>
</div>

## Research Areas

::: {.content-card}

Our PhD students work on problems at the intersection of AI and sustainability, using state-of-the-art methods including **Large Language Models (LLMs), Vision-Language Models (VLMs), computer vision, and advanced ML techniques**.

<div class="research-areas">

<div class="research-area">
<h4>AI for Environmental Monitoring</h4>
<p>Computer vision for satellite imagery analysis, brick kiln detection, air quality inference using Gaussian processes, LLMs for climate policy analysis.</p>
</div>

<div class="research-area">
<h4>Health Sensing & Digital Health</h4>
<p>VLMs for medical imaging, respiratory monitoring (SpiroMask), energy expenditure estimation from thermal imagery (JoulesEye).</p>
</div>

<div class="research-area">
<h4>Energy Analytics</h4>
<p>Non-intrusive load monitoring (NILM), time-series forecasting, smart grid optimization with deep learning.</p>
</div>

<div class="research-area">
<h4>Machine Learning for Social Good</h4>
<p>Multi-modal models for sustainability, LLM-powered tools for air quality stakeholders, uncertainty quantification in deep learning.</p>
</div>

</div>

:::

## PhD Alumni Outcomes

::: {.content-card}

<div class="phd-alumni-card">
<a href="https://rishi-a.github.io">
<img src="https://rishi-a.github.io/images/RISHIRAJ.jpg" alt="Dr. Rishiraj Adhikary">
</a>
<div class="phd-alumni-info">
<div class="name">Dr. Rishiraj Adhikary</div>
<div class="position">Postdoctoral Researcher, University of Cambridge (with Prof. Cecilia Mascolo)</div>
<div class="details">PhD 2019-2025. Health sensing and respiratory monitoring. Fulbright-Nehru Fellow. Published at UbiComp, IMWUT, and more.</div>
</div>
</div>

<div class="phd-alumni-card">
<div class="phd-alumni-info">
<div class="name">Dr. Zeel B Patel</div>
<div class="position">Postdoc, Microsoft Research India</div>
</div>
</div>

<div class="highlight-box">
<strong>Current PhD students</strong> are working on brick kiln detection from satellite imagery, air quality monitoring with LLMs, health sensing using VLMs, and more. See our <a href="members.qmd">current team</a>.
</div>

### Where our graduates go

<div class="outcome-grid">

<div class="outcome-item">
<strong>Postdocs</strong>
<span>University of Cambridge, Microsoft Research India</span>
</div>

<div class="outcome-item">
<strong>PhD programs</strong>
<span>UMass Amherst, Stony Brook, IIT Gandhinagar</span>
</div>

<div class="outcome-item">
<strong>Industry research</strong>
<span>Google DeepMind, Microsoft, Oracle</span>
</div>

<div class="outcome-item">
<strong>Top MS programs</strong>
<span>CMU, Caltech, ETH Zurich, UCSD, NYU</span>
</div>

</div>

:::

## What You Get

::: {.content-card}

- **Funding:** PhD fellowships including PMRF, institute fellowships, and project funding
- **Compute:** NVIDIA A100 GPUs, RTX A5000s — 424GB+ GPU memory across lab servers
- **Mentorship:** Regular 1-on-1 meetings, structured group meetings, and a collaborative lab culture
- **Collaboration:** Opportunities to work with international researchers and industry partners (Google, Cisco, Microsoft, NVIDIA)
- **Publication venues:** Top venues including NeurIPS, UbiComp/IMWUT, BuildSys, AAAI, and more
- **Community:** A supportive lab with 50+ alumni now at leading institutions and companies worldwide

:::

## How to Apply

::: {.content-card}

<div class="timeline-step">
<div class="step-number">1</div>
<div class="step-content">
<h4>Write to Prof. Nipun Batra</h4>
<p>Email with your CV, research interests, and why AI for sustainability excites you. Mention 1-2 papers from our lab you've read.</p>
</div>
</div>

<div class="timeline-step">
<div class="step-number">2</div>
<div class="step-content">
<h4>Discuss research fit</h4>
<p>We'll have a conversation to explore alignment between your interests and our ongoing projects.</p>
</div>
</div>

<div class="timeline-step">
<div class="step-number">3</div>
<div class="step-content">
<h4>Apply to IIT Gandhinagar</h4>
<p>Submit your formal application through the IIT Gandhinagar PhD admissions portal. Applications are accepted twice a year.</p>
</div>
</div>

<div style="margin-top: 24px;">
<a href="mailto:nipun.batra@iitgn.ac.in" class="btn btn-primary">Email Prof. Nipun Batra</a>
<a href="https://www.iitgn.ac.in/academics/phd" target="_blank" class="btn btn-secondary">PhD Application Portal</a>
<a href="papers/index.qmd" class="btn btn-secondary">Browse Our Publications</a>
</div>

:::
